body_txt: He's older and ostensibly wiser, and more than willing to impart his wisdom upon his children, younger siblings, or other youngster. There's just one problem: his advice sucks! Sometimes he's just clueless, but other times, he's intentionally misleading his protege . The most common subversion of the Mentor Archetype , with whom he often forms Opposed Mentors . Overlaps with Know-Nothing Know-It-All and The Blind Leading the Blind . Oftentimes invokes an Ice-Cream Koan . Compare and contrast Mission Control Is Off Its Meds , Anti-Mentor , and Uncertified Expert .
